description: Dense vs dense+graph on the repoqa-structural split (20 tasks, F2LLM-v2-330M). recall@1 is 0 by construction: the gold is a 1-hop neighbour of the needle, which itself holds dense rank 1. Single source for the README 'Structural recall (graph expansion)' table and scripts/plot_structural_recall.py. Published results — do not edit without a new sweep.
